description_long: This is a cylindrical terracotta plant pot with a wide, open mouth and a slightly rounded body. The exterior is decorated with a white, hand-painted vine and leaf motif that wraps around the pot, giving it a rustic and artisanal appearance. The pot's surface has a matte, slightly rough finish typical of unglazed clay, and the reddish-brown color is characteristic of natural terracotta. The interior is unglazed and spacious, suitable for holding soil and a small to medium-sized plant. The base appears flat and stable, though no drainage holes are visible from the provided views. This pot would add a natural, decorative touch to both indoor and outdoor urban environments.
description: A terracotta plant pot with a white vine and leaf pattern, featuring a wide mouth and matte, rustic finish.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the wide, open mouth and unglazed interior of the pot.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the white vine and leaf pattern on the reddish-brown exterior.
description_view_2: Bottom view showing a flat, solid base with no visible drainage holes.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying more of the decorative vine motif on the pot's surface.
attribute_placement_context: ideal for decorating garden paths or urban balconies with potted plants
